title: Device Home Screen - Quick Settings modal
scenario: Quick Settings modal opens with all related options and allows setting changes from Device Home Screen, verified across all Quick Settings after modifying selection in Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
2. On the Home screen, locate the Quick Settings section (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, etc.).
3. Tap on any Quick Setting tile (e.g., ANC).
4. Observe that a modal opens displaying all related options for that setting (e.g., ANC modes: On, Off, Transparency).
5. Change a setting within the modal (e.g., switch from ANC Off to ANC On).
6. Close the modal and verify the change is reflected on the Home screen Quick Setting tile.
7. Repeat steps 3–6 for each available Quick Setting tile on the Home screen.
8. Navigate to Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
9. Change the selection of Quick Settings (e.g., add or remove a setting).
10. Return to the Home screen and repeat steps 3–6 for the newly configured Quick Settings.
expected: Tapping any Quick Setting tile on the Home screen opens a modal with all related options. The user can change settings via the modal, and changes are reflected immediately. This behavior works consistently for all Quick Settings, including after modifying the Quick Settings selection in Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
